# git: alias: support some merge strategies for shake command

**Motivation:** I can merge branch with
- rebase
- rebase and squash

And it makes unavailable practice to clean merged branches.

E.g. https://stackoverflow.com/questions/24800387/mass-deleting-local-branches-that-has-been-rebased-and-merged.
